title: Expectations & Readings
content:
Expectations & Readings
In Week 1, you will:

Read the Introduction to Writing sections below by clicking on each of the links:
Essay Writing
Chapter 1 Section 1: Reading and Writing in College
Chapter 1 Section 3: Becoming a Successful College Writer
Chapter 2 Section 1: Purpose, Audience, Tone, and Content
Chapter 2 Section 2: Effective Means for Writing a Paragraph
Chapter 3 Section 1: Narration
Chapter 6 Section 2: Narrative Essay
Chapter 4 Section 1: Apply Prewriting Methods
Chapter 4 Section 2: Outlining
Grammar
Chapter 11 Reviewing the Basics: Which Word is Correct?
Chapter 12 Section 1: Sentence Writing
Chapter 12 Section 2: Subject-Verb Agreement
Chapter 12 Section 3: Verb Tenses: Past, Present, and Future
Chapter 14 Section 1: Word Order
Chapter 14 Section 5: Verb Tenses
Participate in
Week 1 Discussion: What Does Writing Mean to You? (In class)
Submit
Week 1 Narrative Essay - Prewriting (Due by the end of the week.)
